transcript: [laughing] I had to ask you if you were listening to Slayer.
No, for you no bueno, motherfucker!
You no bueno, motherfucker! [speaks in Spanish]
[accented] You talk to my maraca when you come down here, man.
You... chinga tu madre perra lingo culero!
[laughing, accented] You are no bueno, man.
[accented] Your... your house is no bueno, either.
Me... me for you, mi house. Me... because... you for.. ehh... ehh... mi, for house for you, and, eh, for you, whose house is bueno.
[accented] Ohhh... uhh-ahh! You are no bueno, dude.
Me for you, no bueno, or me?
Me, for me... you for you, bueno. Shut up, fucker.
For you? You come to my house...
[accented] No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no. No, no, no. You are no bueno, dude.
Uh, uh, you. You... for you... friend of my... for my friend.
[accented] Your house is no bueno, man. What do you want, man?
There is... for you... or for me?
You! You, for me. I am no bueno for you.
